stories.headline: CAR HELPS UNCOVER THE DETAILS - Kennedy crash
stories.summary: An in-depth analysis of John F. Kennedy Jr.'s plane crash using aviation databases to explore potential causes, highlighting spatial disorientation and pilot error.

stories.headline: ANALYZING MEDICAL DATA - Transplant Disparity
stories.summary: A New York Daily News investigation using UNOS transplant data revealed that African-American and Latino patients in the New York City area receive fewer heart, liver, and lung transplants despite higher disease rates, with African-Americans facing the longest kidney transplant waits in the nation.
